programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: A young couple struggles to repair a hopelessly dilapidated house

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie - The Plot To Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie The Plot To Kill Hitler is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the ‘Valkyrie’ conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on 20th July 1944 Produced in collaboration with the official German Foundation dedicated to the memory of the conspirators it features testimonials and eyewitness accounts from all of the aristocratic families involved in the plot including the last living conspirator to escape Hitler’s wrath and Maria Countess von Stauffenberg who knew Claus all her life

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 4
programme.desc: Part 4 Showdown in the Iron Triangle

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Siamese twins one timid and kind-hearted and the other reckless and sadistic must make a decision on whether or not to allow an experimental surgery to have them separated even though one of them doesnt want to be split from the other

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When an Ambassador is the prime suspect in a murder investigation Nick ignores his orders and wrongly accuses the powerful politician

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in war games against a rival unit and Pvt Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A telephone cable washes up on the island after a bad storm The castaways try to use it to call home for help

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kates mother and her fiancé visit the McCoys Kate feels theres something not right about the couple

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Determined to fit into a tight Anniversary Dress and concerned that she is taking after her corpulent Aunt Bessie Kate embarks upon a crash program of diet and exercise

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A country singer accidentally swallows an olive with a transmitter in it and Max must protect her from KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS has developed another robot that goes up against Hymie

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilots resistance to interrogation Hogan brings the mans fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Beverely Hills Brats
programme.desc: A rich young boy arranges to be kidnapped so hell get more attention from his parents

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.title: The Mad Bomber
programme.desc: The Police Connection aka The Mad Bomber aka Detective Geronimo

programme.title: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: George Babyface Nelson became one of the most important gangsters of 1930s Chicago by making brutal robberies In order to compete with Al Capone he allied himself with John Dillinger

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology When a Taelon is killed in the same manner the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes partner leaves on private business When he doesnt return Cheyenne follows him to determine what happened Cheyenne finds him in jail where he is shot Cheyenne finds himself in a mess related to an estate and lawyer

programme.title: Young 307
programme.desc: Young 307

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Jacob Willis a trusted employee of a local businessman pays money to a skid-row drifter who was blackmailing him After Jacob leaves him the drifter is accidentally killed in a scuffle with two other hobos One of them tells the police that Jacob killed the man After talking to Jacob Stone has doubts that he could be a killer but then he finds out what the drifter knew about Jacob that he escaped from an Alabama prison 25 years ago Jacob believes he killed a guard during the escape and thinks he must run away or face imprisonment His employers young son trusts Jacob and wants to run away with him

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A pretty airline stewardess badly injures Kimble in a traffic accident and in his delirium he admits who he is and she helps him In turn Kimble helps her realize the married man shes dating is not right for her

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Benny Carr v. Kieran Rice

programme.desc: You've seen the fight - now hear what Sean Quinn has to say about his main event bout against Noah Ali at HK49!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chris Smeltzer

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Dr Frost and his nephew invent a device that can alter the Earths weather and Cy-Kill snatches it to plunge the Earth into a permanent ice age

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss offers a huge reward to pirates and cut-throats if they will deliver Jayce to him A pirate scratches Herc with his special ring which causes Herc to become evil and start plotting against Jayce Jayce must take the Pride to Planet Hippo

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Giant caterpillars appear in the Central American Jungle By clearing a path they reveal a map to the temple of an ancient Malacca civilization

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty fails to reappear during Wondros magic act and ends up in a field in Iowa But VENOM has further plans to hold Lady Liberty for ransom

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Savior of Steel

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Warrior With a Closed Heart

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Baseball World Captain N is playing baseball with Bo Jackson until Mother Brain kidnaps Princess Lana and warps Captain N Simon Duke Megaman Kid Icarus and Bo into the cellars How can they get out and save Lana

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation
